heading: Contact Us
subheading: Get in touch to book an appointment for your dog
intro_text: Each appointment is tailored to your dog's specific needs, so please call to discuss and we can ensure we allocate the correct amount of time to your appointment.
academy_heading: City & Guilds Dog Training Academy | Enquiry Form
academy_intro:
Please complete the form below if you are interested in finding out more about our City & Guilds dog grooming training.

You will then receive an automated email and a booking link to Liza's diary where she will call you to discuss further and answer any questions you may have.
success_message: Thanks for your enquiry — we'll be in touch soon.
